# Verifier Contracts

Auto-generated Solidity contracts that verify Noir ZK proofs on-chain.

## DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY

These files are generated by running `nargo codegen-verifier` on each circuit. Any manual edits will be overwritten.

## Files (Auto-Generated)

| File | Source Circuit | Purpose |
|------|---------------|---------|
| `ShuffleVerifier.sol` | `circuits/shuffle/` | Verifies deck shuffle proofs |
| `DealVerifier.sol` | `circuits/deal/` | Verifies card dealing proofs |
| `BetVerifier.sol` | `circuits/bet/` | Verifies bet validity proofs |
| `RevealVerifier.sol` | `circuits/reveal/` | Verifies card reveal proofs |

## Regenerating

```bash
# From the repo root
./scripts/generate-verifiers.sh

# Or manually for a single circuit
cd circuits/shuffle && nargo codegen-verifier
cp contract/shuffle/plonk_vk.sol ../contracts/verifiers/ShuffleVerifier.sol
```

## Gas Costs

Each `verify()` call costs approximately 200-300k gas on L1. If this becomes prohibitive for the full game flow, the project may migrate to the Aztec network where Noir proofs verify natively.
